raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The black cup is located in front of and next to box_2; there is enough clearance for the right arm to approach from the side without colliding with the boxes or table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held in the right claw gripper and lifted slightly above the table surface."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table_front_right_clear_area",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the front-right corner of the tabletop is clear of other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the front-right corner of the table, safely away from the manipulation zone around the boxes, and the right arm is free."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Left arm can reach the front face of box_2; no objects obstruct the left arm’s approach path. Box_2 must remain immobile to allow separation from box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is gently constrained against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing it from sliding while box_1 is manipulated."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With box_2 stabilized, there is lateral clearance for the right arm to reach the accessible side of box_1. The right end-effector can make broad palm contact under and against the side of box_1, and lifting space above the box is unobstructed.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely grasped and lifted clear of the tabletop, detached from box_2, and held in the right arm. Task 'Pick up the darker box' is achieved while box_2 remains stable and the cup is safely out of the way."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The black cup is located in front of and next to box_2; there is enough clearance for the right arm to approach from the side without colliding with the boxes or table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held in the right claw gripper and lifted slightly above the table surface.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the front-right corner of the tabletop is clear of other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the front-right corner of the table, safely away from the manipulation zone around the boxes, and the right arm is free.

parsed_json.Precondition: Left arm can reach the front face of box_2; no objects obstruct the left arm’s approach path. Box_2 must remain immobile to allow separation from box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is gently constrained against the tabletop by the left arm, preventing it from sliding while box_1 is manipulated.

parsed_json.Precondition: With box_2 stabilized, there is lateral clearance for the right arm to reach the accessible side of box_1. The right end-effector can make broad palm contact under and against the side of box_1, and lifting space above the box is unobstructed.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely grasped and lifted clear of the tabletop, detached from box_2, and held in the right arm. Task 'Pick up the darker box' is achieved while box_2 remains stable and the cup is safely out of the way.
